subcodes.first_line: O ye seekers of truth! Striving and seeking after reality is a weighty burden and a trust from the glorious Lord, before which the heavens and earth were made humble [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طالبان حق مجاهده و طلب حق حمل ثقیل است و امانت رب جلیل آسمان و زمین تمکین
subcodes.subjects: @condition of search, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
